welcome.title: Welcome to Stampeo
welcome.subtitle: Let's get your loyalty program ready.
welcome.body: In a few minutes you'll have a branded digital card live in your customers' wallets — and a first stamp sent to your own phone.

identity.subtitle: Tell us what your business is called and where to find it.

branding.title: Branding
